notes: Full food menu captured from online ordering system including starters, bowls, salads, sandwiches, burgers, pizza, sides, kids, and dessert. No beverage alcohol menu (draft beer, cocktails, wine) was present in the raw text — only non-alcoholic drinks and two N/A craft options were listed; alcohol menu skipped/unavailable in this source.

dishes.name: Fish + Chips
dishes.description: Line caught Alaskan cod, hand-dipped in IPA beer batter, waffle fries, coleslaw, side of tartar
dishes.price_note: price listed as $20.50+, modifier pricing not specified

dishes.name: Fried Chicken Sando
dishes.description: 48 hour brined breast, fried in a buttermilk and herb batter, cherry pepper cream cheese, tomatoes and coleslaw on a brioche bun with garlic aioli. Can be tossed in buffalo sauce.

dishes.name: Weekly Wings (Weekend Special)
dishes.description: One pound house smoked chicken wings smothered in roasted habanero pepper & mango sauce, topped with fresh mango salsa, served with ranch for dipping

dishes.name: Porchetta Sando (Weekend Special)
dishes.description: Hand rolled, slowly roasted pork belly and herbs sliced thick topped with melting provolone, garden tomatoes, arugula and rustic pesto on a toasted hoagie. Served with house cut parmesan fries. Add-ons: +$3 bacon, +$3 avocado.

dishes.name: Avocado & Prawn Salad (Weekend Special)
dishes.description: Sautéed Gulf shrimp over arugula and spinach tossed in a creamy avocado dressing topped with crispy quinoa, pickled red onions, cherry tomatoes, prosciutto. Add avocado +$1, sub grilled salmon +$1, feta.

dishes.name: Jerk Pork Tenderloin Skillet (Weekend Special)
dishes.description: Grilled pork tenderloin marinated in traditional jerk seasoning (allspice, cayenne, sugar...) topped with grilled pineapple salsa and fried sweet maduros over cilantro rice, black beans and cotija in a hot skillet served with mild spiced green beans

dishes.name: Kapa'a Ahi Bowl (Weekend Special)
dishes.description: Sesame encrusted seared Ahi over toasted heirloom black herbed rice, grilled pineapple, mango-pineapple salsa, sliced radish, cucumbers, pickled onions and sautéed snap peas over arugula and spinach tossed in a ginger-soy vinaigrette topped with crispy fried wontons

dishes.name: CB's Nuts
dishes.description: Locally roasted jumbo peanuts
dishes.price_note: listed as $4.50+, modifier pricing not specified

dishes.name: Chips 'N Dip
dishes.description: A basket of house cut russet potato chips and caramelized French onion dip

dishes.name: Chips 'N Salsa
dishes.description: Basket of house fried corn chips and authentic house made Mexican salsa

dishes.name: Avo-Cod-o Tacos (2)
dishes.description: Two tacos with blackened Alaskan cod, cabbage slaw, fresh avocado & sour sriracha aioli

dishes.name: Pork Belly Street Tacos (2)
dishes.description: Two grilled flour tortillas filled with carnitas style seared whisky/maple braised pork belly, grilled pineapple salsa, cilantro cream and house pickled onions. Add a taco +$4.

dishes.name: Banh Mi Sliders (2)
dishes.description: Two soy marinated braised pork belly sliders with pickled carrots, fresh jalapeños, fresh cilantro and a Sriracha aioli on sweet Hawaiian rolls

dishes.name: Fried Chicken Slider (2)
dishes.description: Two buttermilk fried chicken sliders, cherry pepper cream cheese, pickled onions, tomatoes and coleslaw on sweet Hawaiian rolls with garlic aioli. Add a slider +$4.

dishes.name: Mozzi Stix (4)
dishes.description: Four crisp herb breaded, house made fresh mozzarella sticks served with marinara

dishes.name: Chicken Tenders + Fries (4pc)
dishes.description: 48 hour brined breast, fried in a buttermilk and herb batter, served with hand cut fries

dishes.name: Thai Power Chicken Bowl
dishes.description: 3oz tender roasted chicken in a tahini yogurt marinade over brown rice with cilantro-soy kale, red cabbage, pickled carrots, cucumbers, fresh cilantro, and peanuts finished with a tahini drizzle

dishes.name: Thai Power Chicken Bowl (Large)
dishes.description: 6oz tender roasted chicken in a tahini yogurt marinade over brown rice with cilantro-soy kale, red cabbage, pickled carrots, cucumbers, fresh cilantro, and peanuts finished with a tahini drizzle

dishes.name: Buddha Bowl
dishes.description: Kale and spinach tossed in a white balsamic vinaigrette, with toasted quinoa and brown rice, garbanzo beans, nutmeg, roasted sweet potatoes, cucumber and radish topped with 2 fried tofu, finished with toasted pepitas and gorgonzola cheese, served with grilled bread

dishes.name: Buddha Bowl (Large)
dishes.description: Kale and spinach tossed in a white balsamic vinaigrette, with toasted quinoa and brown rice, garbanzo beans, nutmeg, roasted sweet potatoes, cucumber and radish topped with 4 fried tofu, finished with toasted pepitas and gorgonzola cheese, served with grilled bread

dishes.name: Bang Bang Bowl
dishes.description: 4oz thick cut chili hoisin glazed pork belly over arugula tossed in a soy vinaigrette with toasted sesame soba noodles, thai spiced green beans, avocado, pickled carrots, radish and scallions topped with toasted sesame seeds

dishes.name: Bang Bang Bowl (Large)
dishes.description: 6oz thick cut chili hoisin glazed pork belly over arugula tossed in a soy vinaigrette with toasted sesame soba noodles, thai spiced green beans, avocado, pickled carrots, radish and scallions topped with toasted sesame seeds

dishes.name: Teriyaki Salmon Bowl
dishes.description: 3oz teriyaki glazed AK salmon over arugula and kale tossed in a soy-cilantro vinaigrette, with avocado, pickled carrots, pickled onions, warm sticky rice and edamame, finished with toasted sesame seeds

dishes.name: Teriyaki Salmon Bowl (Large)
dishes.description: 5oz teriyaki glazed AK salmon over arugula and kale tossed in a soy-cilantro vinaigrette, with avocado, pickled carrots, pickled onions, warm sticky rice and edamame, finished with toasted sesame seeds

dishes.name: SW Steak Bowl
dishes.description: 4oz blackened teres major steak grilled to order, topped with fresh chimichurri and avocado over roasted corn salsa and cilantro rice, with arugula and romaine tossed in a cilantro-lime vinaigrette finished with a cilantro crema drizzle and cotija

dishes.name: SW Steak Bowl (Large)

dishes.name: French Dip
dishes.description: 6oz thin sliced top round marinated in pan jus, quickly seared with melting provolone cheese and caramelized onions on a toasted hoagie roll with horseradish cream on the side and rosemary au jus for dipping. Add bacon +$3.
